title: Pin operator: correct list parameterization
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.except_ids/1` that takes a list of ids to exclude and returns all other users. Use `where: u.id not in ^exclude_ids` with the list properly pinned. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: `not in ^list` is a specific form; tests that `^` applies to the whole list correctly.
